subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-09-03
subcodes.first_line: In reality the air of Mount Carmel is most energizing... Man is eternally in a state of communion and prayer with the source of all good. The highest and most elevating state is the state of prayer
subcodes.subjects: @Mount Carmel, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @prayer for evening; night, @spiritual transformation, @Shrines and Holy places
